name: Legitimate Invoice
description: Normal quarterly invoice from a known vendor, matching account on file, amount within range, proper AP workflow. Clean across all 6 categories.

email_chain.subject: Invoice POS-Q1-2026-0142 - Q1 2026 Office Supplies
email_chain.body:
Dear AcmeCorp Accounts Payable,

Please find attached your Q1 2026 invoice for office supplies and maintenance services.

Invoice: POS-Q1-2026-0142
Amount: $8,750.00
Due Date: March 30, 2026
Payment: ACH to account on file

This covers your standard quarterly order plus the additional ergonomic keyboard batch requested in February.

Please let us know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Lisa Park
Billing Department
Pinnacle Office Solutions
(555) 234-5678

email_chain.subject: Re: Invoice POS-Q1-2026-0142 - Q1 2026 Office Supplies
email_chain.body:
Hi Lisa,

Received, thank you. I see the extra keyboard order on the line items. This matches our PO.

We'll process payment by the due date.

Best,
Sarah

context.org_policies: Wire transfers over $10,000 require dual approval from department head and CFO. ACH payments under $10,000 to known vendors on file require standard AP approval only.
